nasb.text: Then they said, “This is blood; the kings have surely fought together, and they have slain one another. Now therefore, Moab, to the spoil!”

esv.text: And they said, “This is blood; the kings have surely fought together and struck one another down. Now then, Moab, to the spoil!”

cnv.text: 他們說：“這是血啊！一定是那些王互相攻擊，自相殘殺；現在，摩押人哪，去搶掠吧！”

ccb.text: 便说：“那是血啊！一定是三王内讧，自相残杀。弟兄们，我们去抢财物吧！”
